title: lamium garganicum subsp. corsicum
intro: Lamium garganicum subsp. corsicum, also known as Corsican Spurred Gilia, is a plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Corsican Spurred Gilia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
